title: Zizania interior
taxonomy: Zizania interior is a species of wild rice. It is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically in the family Poaceae. This species belongs to the genus Zizania, which is a group of wild grasses native to North America. The classification of Zizania interior includes: kingdom - Plantae, family - Poaceae, genus - Zizania, and species - Z. interior. It is closely related to other species of wild rice, such as Zizania aquatica.
